title: Keto Pan-Seared Fish
description: A simple keto recipe for pan-seared fish seasoned with portuguese spices.

ingredients.name: Fish fillet (such as cod or tilapia)

instructions: Season the fish fillets with flaky sea salt and portuguese seasoning.
Heat the skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the avocado oil to the skillet and swirl to coat.
Add the fish fillets to the skillet and sear for 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the fish to a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
Add the fresh parsley to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Serve the fish with the parsley sauce and lemon wedges.
